channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-29 14:31 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Today I was walking around in Sausalito and asking@grokvoice how much apartments around me cost to r...
item.description: Today I was walking around in Sausalito and asking@grokvoice how much apartments around me cost to rent and it was truly an AGI-ly experience

item.title: @elonmusk: In some cases, where we don’t have access to the source code, eg network switch software, we are als...
item.description: In some cases, where we don’t have access to the source code, eg network switch software, we are also decompiling and modifying the binaries to improve performance

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build daily updates
item.description: Grok Build daily updates

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla FSD v14 Lite is rolling out to customers with our AI3 hardware
item.description: Tesla FSD v14 Lite is rolling out to customers with our AI3 hardware

item.title: @elonmusk: Neuralink is needed to solve the super low & lossy output bandwidth of humans. Our input bandwidth, ...
item.description: Neuralink is needed to solve the super low & lossy output bandwidth of humans. Our input bandwidth, thanks to vision, is many orders of magnitude higher than our output bandwidth, but could also be greatly improved. By addressing these bandwidth limitations and greatly increasing our effective cognitive capacity, human-AI symbiosis will be far better, improving the probability of a great outcome for humanity in the future.

item.title: @elonmusk: Nice work by the@Tesla_AIteam! The AI3 computer only has ~15% of the effective memory bandwidth of A...
item.description: Nice work by the@Tesla_AIteam! The AI3 computer only has ~15% of the effective memory bandwidth of AI4, so this was a tough challenge.

item.title: @elonmusk: Highest death count of any philosophy
item.description: Highest death count of any philosophy

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX just launched 2 Falcon 9 rockets in 10 hours Falcon 9 lifted off from California and delivere...
item.description: SpaceX just launched 2 Falcon 9 rockets in 10 hours Falcon 9 lifted off from California and delivered 24 more Starlink satellites to orbit Then another Falcon 9 launched from Florida, sending SXM-11 private/commercial mission to orbit Two different coasts - Two Different missions Two reused boosters - One insane launch cadence There is no other company that can launch like SpaceX... SpaceX is operating at a completely different level At this point, Falcon 9 launches are starting to look like airline departures

item.title: @elonmusk: Feminism was created to dismantle the family, not to liberate women.
item.description: Feminism was created to dismantle the family, not to liberate women.

item.title: @elonmusk: Really impressive first few drives with FSD v14 lite! Big leap in capability and feature set from v1...
item.description: Really impressive first few drives with FSD v14 lite! Big leap in capability and feature set from v12.6.4, it’s tuned for safety right now so it’s taking things slow and smoothly. Highway performance was notably great. More videos and a very long form review later once I get a few more hours of driving in.

item.title: @elonmusk: Well said
item.description: Well said

item.title: @elonmusk: For a US official to fly the flag of another country after having sworn an oath of citizenship that ...
item.description: For a US official to fly the flag of another country after having sworn an oath of citizenship that requires sole loyalty to America is nothing but treason!

item.title: @elonmusk: Time to invoke the Communist Control Act. Marxism is an enemy ideology, and it needs to be treated a...
item.description: Time to invoke the Communist Control Act. Marxism is an enemy ideology, and it needs to be treated as such.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink New Zealand
item.description: Starlink New Zealand

item.title: @elonmusk: Oppressive & irrational government rules only make things worse
item.description: Oppressive & irrational government rules only make things worse

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨ANOTHER CITY FALLS: DOWNTOWN CHICAGO SEIZED FOR ISLAM While our leaders obsess over Europe’s slow d...
item.description: 🚨ANOTHER CITY FALLS: DOWNTOWN CHICAGO SEIZED FOR ISLAM While our leaders obsess over Europe’s slow death, Chicago is being captured right now. On June 25, 2026, thousands of Shia Muslims took over downtown Chicago streets for their annual Ashura procession. Not inside their mosques. They seized public streets in the heart of the city a sea of burqas, black flags, and men rhythmically beating their chests in mourning for their prophet. This is not quiet prayer. This is a public show of force and total commitment to their ideology. Chicago already has over 100 mosques. Yet they still flood downtown, shut down streets, and perform their rituals openly in the name of “justice”, the same “justice” that ultimately means Sharia. This is the exact same pattern we just saw in Dearborn: public dominance, demographic replacement, and zero interest in assimilation. Chicago’s streets now belong to them for the day. Soon it will be permanent. We are losing one American city after another to Islamic supremacism while our politicians and media pretend it’s only happening across the ocean. Dearborn. Chicago. Minneapolis Patterson Hamtramck Houston Detroit... Next? Wake up! This is not immigration. This is conquest by inches, and they are no longer hiding it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Originally USAID was a slush fund invented in 1964 during the cold war under the Johnson Doctrine. A...
item.description: Originally USAID was a slush fund invented in 1964 during the cold war under the Johnson Doctrine. An election fund to prevent communist and Socialist regimes from the Western Hemisphere. Mainly Central and South America.. Democrats abused and perverted USAID to elect Socialist and Communist fegimes in the western hemisphere. And radical Islamic Regimes in Northwest Africa This phenomenon isn't immediately apparent but a map. And the dates of the elections shows a trend.

item.title: @elonmusk: There are no American flags, but there are flags of many other countries. Those whose loyalty is to ...
item.description: There are no American flags, but there are flags of many other countries. Those whose loyalty is to another country over America are, by definition, traitors and must be expelled immediately.

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9’s first stage has landed on the A Shortfall of Gravitas droneship
item.description: Falcon 9’s first stage has landed on the A Shortfall of Gravitas droneship

item.title: @elonmusk: Truly massive gains will come in ~3 months when the entire training and inference stack is written i...
item.description: Truly massive gains will come in ~3 months when the entire training and inference stack is written in C/C++ and massively simplified (most software layers will be deleted completely) and we exact-map Grok to work incredibly well on a GB300
